changes.summary: Enabled the straight-line balance loop so long-run drift is corrected by live wheel-difference feedback instead of relying only on static trim.
Lowered the entry threshold, widened the straight-driving recognition window, and moderately increased the straight-balance gains and output limit.
Raised STRAIGHT_SIDE_TRIM conservatively from 0.06 to 0.08 to bias against the observed persistent left drift.
